strategy_summary: The flower petal nests of Osmia avosetta bees are durable and humid because of their multi-layer design, with a hard layer sandwiched between organic layers. Photographs generously provided by Dr.
mechanism:
The flower petal nests of Osmia avosetta bees are durable and humid because of their multi-layer design, with a hard layer sandwiched between organic layers.

Photographs generously provided by Dr. Rozen, 11/22/10.
